workLog.task: Issue #1728 tracer: context-pressure detection and graceful degradation for the implementer agent (user scoped to implementer only, not the 24-agent fleet)
workLog.outcome: Added a Context Budget Management section to implementer: name the in-output pressure signals (stubs, re-reads, lost acceptance criteria), a checkpoint protocol (commit correct work, record progress in the session log, return [NEEDS_DECOMPOSITION] when budget is nearly spent), and a degrade-do-not-fail-silently rule that ties to the existing PreCompact checkpoint hook. Inserted before ## Handoff, a region disjoint from the #1908 fallback edit so the two open PRs 3-way merge without conflict. Mirrored into both hand copies; regenerated copilot+vscode; bumped both plugin manifests.
